about.subtitle: Best Physiotherapist in Patna
about.title: Advanced Physiotherapy Clinic & Home Visits
about.description: Dr. Shyam Kumar is a highly qualified physiotherapy consultant in Patna specializing in neuro-rehabilitation, orthopedic care, and sports injuries. We offer modern machines and hand-on therapies to treat back pain, paralysis, and nerve issues without side effects—right in his clinic or at your home.

services.title: Specialized Treatments & Neuro-Rehabilitation
services.description: We are experts in treating complex neurological and orthopedic conditions using advanced manual therapy and modern electrotherapy techniques in Patna.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our physiotherapy services.
faq.a1: Yes! We specialize in Home Visit Appointments in Patna for patients who cannot travel to the clinic, ensuring they receive uninterrupted rehabilitation from the comfort of their home.
faq.q2: Do treatments have any side effects?
faq.a2: No. Our physiotherapy treatments and the modern machines we use are completely safe and do not cause any adverse side effects. Our focus is on natural healing and movement.
faq.q3: What should I expect during a free consultation?
faq.a3: During your free consultation, Dr. Shyam Kumar will assess your condition, listen to your concerns, and outline a customized treatment plan tailored specifically to your pain or injury.
faq.q4: How long is a typical physiotherapy session?
faq.a4: A single session usually lasts between 45 to 60 minutes depending on the condition being treated and the therapies required.

testimonials.title: Patient Stories & Success
testimonials.description: Read what our patients have to say about their recovery journeys and how physiotherapy helped them reclaim their lives.

rev1.name: Rajesh Verma
rev1.comment: I was suffering from severe back pain for months. Dr. Shyam's treatment helped me recover without any surgery. Highly recommend his home visit services!

rev2.name: Meera Devi
rev2.comment: The post-surgery home visits were a blessing. I can walk comfortably now thanks to his expert guidance and modern therapy techniques.

rev3.name: Amit Shah
rev3.comment: Complete relief in just 10 sessions! The focused approach and personalized care made all the difference. Very professional treatment.

rev4.name: Priya Singh
rev4.comment: Truly the best physiotherapy consultant in Patna. The non-invasive treatments are highly effective and safe. My mobility has improved significantly.
